content:
A 9 months pregnant woman posing in an elegant fine-art studio scene. She wears a cream/beige tailored blazer layered over a fitted white maternity dress that gently highlights the baby bump. A black silk ribbon bow tie at the collar. She holds a bouquet of vibrant red flowers. Wearing a wide flat straw hat with black chin straps. Soft natural makeup, gentle expression, graceful posture.
Outdoor prairie landscape with a real white horse walking behind her. Vast grassland, dusty path, gentle breeze, dramatic sky, warm sunset light, long shadows, cinematic composition, luxury fashion editorial style, rich warm tones, ultra photorealistic, natural light photography.
Use the uploaded image as the face reference. Don’t change the face of reference image. Preserve 100% facial identity, exact likeness, facial structure, proportions, skin texture, and expression. No modification, no beautification, no stylization on the face. Only recreate pose, outfit, accessories, lighting, and background.

metadata.title: Bà bầu duyên dáng bên bên hoa mận
metadata.description: Bà bầu duyên dáng bên bên hoa mận tại Mộc Châu

content:
Use the uploaded photo as the identity reference.

IMPORTANT:
Keep the EXACT same face, identity, facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, and expression from the original image.
Do not modify or stylize the face.
Do not change ethnicity or facial proportions.
Only change body, outfit, pose, and environment.

CONCEPT:
Elegant maternity studio photoshoot celebrating pregnancy and motherhood. Soft, feminine, warm, luxurious, natural emotions.

BACKGROUND:
Minimalist professional studio, clean beige/cream solid background, high-key lighting, soft natural light, smooth shadows, no furniture, no objects, no clutter, fashion editorial look.

OUTFIT & ACCESSORIES:
White/cream maternity fashion styling.
Soft white crop top or bra.
Oversized blazer worn open.
Loose wide-leg trousers.
Bare baby bump visible naturally.
Minimal jewelry only (thin rings or none).
Premium fabric, soft flowy texture.

LIGHTING & CAMERA:
Soft diffused studio light, flattering shadows, glowing skin tones.
85mm lens look, f/2.0, shallow depth of field.
Sharp focus, photorealistic, high detail skin texture.
Professional photography, 4K resolution, fashion magazine quality.

GENERATE A SET OF 6 DIFFERENT SHOTS WITH THESE POSES:

SHOT 1 – Front standing portrait:
Standing straight, facing camera, both hands gently supporting belly, soft smile, confident motherhood energy.

SHOT 2 – Side profile silhouette:
45-degree side profile, showing full pregnancy curve, one hand under belly, one hand on hip, elegant posture.

SHOT 3 – Close-up belly detail:
Close framing from chest to hips, hands caressing belly, focus on hands and bump, intimate and emotional.

SHOT 4 – Looking down pose:
Medium shot, mother looking down at belly with tender smile, both hands holding bump, warm loving feeling.

SHOT 5 – Full body fashion pose:
Full body shot, relaxed stance, blazer slightly open, legs apart naturally, modern editorial maternity style.

SHOT 6 – Natural smiling portrait:
Half body portrait, soft eye contact with camera, gentle smile, one hand on belly, one hand in pocket or resting casually.

STYLE KEYWORDS:
photorealistic, maternity photography, studio portrait, soft light, luxury, clean, elegant, motherhood, warm tones, editorial fashion, high detail, realistic skin, natural body proportions

OUTPUT:
6 separate images, consistent lighting, outfit, and background.

Add a small handwritten-style watermark that reads ‘Prompt by: anph21’. Use a beautiful cursive font, thin strokes, low opacity, placed at the bottom right. Don’t change the face of reference image
